True—individual hiring is a risk bet for both sides, with imperfect signals. "Undeniable value" typically builds via low-cost proofs: GitHub portfolios, certs (e.g., AWS, CAD), freelance gigs, or targeted projects showing output, not just degrees. BLS data: 85%+ of engineering
